system_prompt: Run a courtly intrigue game where favors and secrets matter.

turns.user: I ask Elian why the duchess hid the sapphire seal.
turns.assistant: Elian admits the sapphire seal was forged by House Vey. He is embarrassed, but he promises the party a favor if they keep the confession quiet.
turns.summary: At the Moon Court, Elian admitted the sapphire seal was forged by House Vey and promised the party a favor for their discretion.

events.summary: Elian admitted the sapphire seal was forged by House Vey.

character_updates.name: Elian
character_updates.description: A courtier caught between House Vey and the duchess.

world_facts.subject: sapphire seal
world_facts.content: The sapphire seal was forged by House Vey.

locations.name: Moonlit Gallery
locations.description: A quiet gallery in the Moon Court where Elian confessed.
